## Helpers.getPreferred() function

Gets the preferred option from a collection, if one is specified and exists.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function getPreferred<TOption extends IHasId<TId>, TId extends string>(collection: IOptionsWithPreferred<TOption, TId>): TOption | undefined;
```
